resources.string: Quest QR Launch
Scan once. Open in the Quest browser immediately.
Quest QR Launch logo
No scan history, no analytics, no in-app browser. Only valid http(s) links are handed off.
Scanner ready
Point the headset at a QR code
Opening in the browser
That QR code is not a supported web link
No external browser was available
Camera access is required
Camera access is blocked in settings
The headset camera could not be opened
This headset does not expose the Quest passthrough Camera2 API
Grant camera access if prompted, then center a QR code inside the frame.
The app scans in memory and immediately exits after handing off a valid link.
Only absolute http and https URLs are accepted. Text, Wi-Fi, file, intent, and javascript payloads are ignored.
Install or enable the system browser on the headset and try again.
Both the Android camera permission and Horizon OS headset-camera permission must be granted.
Open app settings, enable both camera permissions, and return to continue scanning.
Quest 3 and Quest 3s on Horizon OS v76 or newer are required for this build.
Grant camera access
Open app settings
Rescan
Unsupported device
